title: Araghchi: 'no progress' but 'communication not cut off' — reviewing exchanged texts, working on 'final formula'; warns Beirut attacks could jeopardize ceasefire
snippet: Iran Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi stated: 'Our communication with the Americans has not been cut off but no progress has been achieved in the negotiations.' Both sides are reviewing exchanged texts and working on a 'final formula.' He warned that Israeli attacks on Beirut could jeopardize the ceasefire: 'The result of aggression against Beirut will be the return of war.' Nuanced shift from 6/1 'complete suspension' to 'no progress but communication continues.'
tag_reason: 신규 사건 — 아라그치가 6/1 '중단' 이후 '소통은 차단되지 않았다'로 톤 변화. '최종 공식(final formula)' 언급은 새로운 표현으로, 양측이 문서를 검토 중임을 확인. 6/1 완전 중단에서의 미묘하지만 유의미한 후퇴
